reason: Agent successfully navigated to example.com, retrieved the page title "Example Domain", and reported it back with browser tool execution details.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully showing Super Agent interface with three agents listed in sidebar.
Clicked on agent "QA-20260320-024130-0epg" in the sidebar - Chat interface opened with message input field ready.
Typed and sent message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." - Message appeared in chat and agent status changed to "working".

Waited for agent response - Agent successfully executed browser tools in sequence: (1) Opened browser, (2) Navigated to https://example.com, (3) Took page snapshot, (4) Retrieved page title using "get title" command, (5) Closed browser.

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" - Response clearly states "The page title is **Example Domain**" and provides additional context: "The page at https://example.com has the title \"Example Domain\". It's a simple placeholder page maintained by IANA with a single \"Learn more\" link." Agent completed in 17 seconds.
